CustomField.description: Controls which mapping engine the data import process uses to map Data Import fields to target objects. Help Text uses legacy field-level help text values to define mappings. Data Import Field Mapping uses custom metadata records for a more flexible, configurable approach.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select Help Text for legacy help text-based mappings, or Data Import Field Mapping for the newer custom metadata-based mapping approach.
CustomField.label: Field Mapping Method
